title: Please send me a card
question: 把今天课文里「假期里一直惦记一个小任务」的感觉、放进你自己的生活——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景的空都填上、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: 老师有一次旅行回来前，心里一直想着整理照片，结果 spent the whole day 挑滤镜，却 did not send a single picture.
word_bank: did not write a single word
did not finish a single page

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 假期作业一直惦记、一直没开始
options.english_template: During the holiday, I ___ my homework every day, but I did not start it.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 花很久挑照片、但没有发出去
options.english_template: I ___ choosing photos for my family, but I did not send a single picture.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 打开本子写日记、只写了几行
options.english_template: I opened my notebook and wrote ___, but I still did not finish the diary.
